---
title: "Daniel Ramos"
image: media/erik.headshot.jpg
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com
---

## Education

**B.S. in Statistics and Data Science**
University of California, Santa Barbara | March 2026

**B.A. in Economics and Accounting**
University of California, Santa Barbara | March 2026
